calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Beneficiaries Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Dennis Ziebell.

Mr. Gross stated that it was very clear on the face of the will that the intent was to remove Mr. Brohous. The court took the petition to determine beneficiaries entitled to distribution of estate under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Beneficiaries Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Continued To May-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
For Issuance Of Letters Testamentary To Sole Executor Dennis Ziebell Upon Resignation Of Co-Executor William Pung

For Issuance Of Letters Testamentary To Sole Executor Dennis Ziebell Upon Resignation Of Co-Executor William Pung
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 202

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Dennis Ziebell and William Pung.

The Court stated that clear and convincing evidence exists to determine that this is the will the Decedent intended to make. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
